block.header: =N(" yamato no kuni ni imasi te opo ya sima guni terasi tama pi wosame tama pu yamato ne kwo sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritama pu opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,PP-GEN,NP,2@倭根子天皇我御命良麻止勅布,*

block.header: =N(" kotosi no mina dukwi no towo ka amari muyu ka no pi no saru no toki ni tatumi no sumi ni atari te ito ayasi ku koto ni urupasi ki kumo nana iro api maziri te tati nobori te ari ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@今年乃六月十六日申時仁,*

block.header: =N(" ko wo ware midukara mo mi sonapa si mata paberu moro moro no pito domo mo tomo ni mi te ayasi bwi yoroko bwitutu aru apida ni ise no kuni no kami piro ki itu tu no kurawi no simo tu sina abe no asomi aduma pito ra ga mawosa ku mina dukwi no towo ka mari nanu ka no pi ni watarapi no kopori no toyuke no miya no upe ni atari te itu iro no sirusi no kumo tati opopi te ari ")

comment.raw: CP-FINAL,IP-SUB,PP-GEN,NP,6@五位下阿倍朝臣東人等我奏久六月十七日尔,*
CP-FINAL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,7@度会郡乃等由気乃宮乃上仁当天,*

block.header: =N(" kore ni yori te so no kata wo kaki utusite tatematuru to mawos e ri ")

=N(" mata onyau no tukasa mo pumi dukwi no towo ka no pi ni inu wi no sumi ni urupasi ku koto ni aru kumo tati te ari onazi tukwi no patu ka amari mi ka no pi ni tatumi no sumi ni aru kumo moto ake ni suwe ki ni yaya itu iro wo sonape tu to mawos e ri ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@復陰陽寮毛七月十日尔,*

block.header: =N(" ka ku ayasi ku koto naru kumo no arapare ta ru yuwe wo kamugape simuru ni nori no tukasa domo ga mawosa ku zuwisho ni tubusa ni kamugapuru ni kore sunapati keiun ni ari ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,4@式部省等我奏久瑞書尔細勘尔,*

block.header: =N(" makoto ni daizuwi ni kanap yeri to mawo s eri ")

=N(" sikaru ni wa ga omoposi myesa ku ka ku opo ki ni taputwo ku ayasi ku koto ni aru opo ki sirusi pa piziri no sumyera ga mi yo ni itar eru mi utukusibwi ni mede te ame tuti no arapa si tamapu mono to namo tune mo kikosi mye su ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,1@朕念行久如是久大仁貴久奇,*

block.header: =N(" kore ani apete wa ga utukusibwi i ame tuti no mi kokoro wo ugokasi maturu be ki koto pa na si to namo omoposi mye su ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-TOP,NP,IP-REL,1@朕徳伊天地乃御心乎令感動末都流倍岐,*

block.header: =N(" sikaru ni ko pa opo mi kamwi no miya no upe ni arapasi tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@此方大御神宮上尔示顕給,*

block.header: =N(" kare napo ko pa opo mi kamwi no utukusi bwi arapasi tama p yeru mono n ari ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@故尚是方大神乃慈備示給幣流,*

block.header: =N(" mata kake maku mo kasikwo ki miyo miyo no saki no sumyera ga mi tama no tasuke tama pi utukusibwi tama p yeru mono n ari ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,NP;@3,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-GEN,NP,1@御世御世乃先乃皇我御霊乃助給比慈給幣流,*

block.header: =N(" mata ini si mu tukwi ni puta nanu ka no apida moro moro no opo tera no dai popu si tati wo mase matu rapete sai syau wau gyau wo kaudoku se sime maturi mata kitisyauten no kekwa wo tukape matura simu ru ni moro moro no dai popu si tati ga kotowari no goto ku tutwome te ima sepi mata moro moro no omi tati no ame no sita no maturi goto wo kotowari ni kanapi te tukape maturu ni yori te si samu bou mo shoten mo ame tuti no kamwi tati mo tomo ni arapasi tama p yeru ayasi ku taputwo ki opo ki sirusi no kumo ni aru rasi to namo omoposi mye su ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,2@二七日之間諸大寺乃大法師等乎奏請良倍天,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,4@又吉祥天乃悔過乎令仕奉流尔,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,6@勤天坐佐比又諸臣等乃天下乃政事乎合理天奉仕尔依天之,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,IP-REL,7@三宝毛諸天毛天地乃神多知毛共尔示現賜幣流奇久貴伎,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,PP-GEN,NP,9@瑞乃雲尔在良之止奈毛念行湏,*

block.header: =N(" kare koko wo motite ayasi ku yorokobo si ki opo ki sirusi wo itadaki ni uke tamapari te sinwobi te moda aru koto e zu site namo opo kimi tati omi tati wo myesi te tomo ni yoroko bwi taputwo bwi ame tuti no mi utukusibwi wo mukui maturu be si to namo omoposi myesu to noritama pu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,7@天地乃御恩乎奉報倍之止奈毛,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP,NP,9@天皇我御命遠諸聞食止宣,*

block.header: =N(" sikaru ni sore ame pa yorodu no mono wo yo ku opopi yasinapi tama pi utukusi bwi apare mi tamapu mono ni ima su ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@夫天方万物乎能覆養賜比慈備愍美賜,*

block.header: =N(" mata opo mi kamwi no miya no negwi opo mono imi uti bito domo ni pa puta sina tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又大神宮乃祢冝大物忌内人等尔波叙二級,*

block.header: =N(" tadasi mi kamunagi ywori simo tu kata no pito domo ni pa pito sina tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@但御巫以下人等叙一級級,*

block.header: =N(" mata ise no kuni no kamu kopori puta kopori no mi yatukwo to kuni guni no papuri uwimuwi domo to ni pito sina tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又伊勢国神郡二郡司及諸国祝部有位无位等賜一級,*

block.header: =N(" mata mu tu no kurawi ywori simo tu kata to pidari migi no mi satwo no wotoko womina no tosi mu swo di ywori kami tu kata to ni pito sina tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又六位以下及左右京男女年六十以上賜一級,*

block.header: =N(" tadasi opo ki mu tu no kurawi no kami tu sina no samusen ywori upe wo kasane taru mono ni pa kami tu opo ki mu tu no kurawi no kami tu sina wo tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@但正六位上重三力田者賜上正六位上,*

block.header: =N(" mata keuzi zyunson gibu keu bu seti bu rikiden ni pa puta sina tamapi so no kadwo ni sirusi wo tatete mwi no wopari ni itaru made tadikara yurusi tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又孝子順孫義夫孝婦節婦力田者賜二級,*

block.header: =N(" mata itu tu no kurawi ywori kami tu kata no pito domo ni mi te tu mono tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又五位以上人等賜御手物,*

block.header: =N(" mata ame no sita kuni guni no kotosi no tadikara nakaba wo yurusi tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又天下諸国今年田租半免,*

block.header: =N(" mata ya swo di ywori kami tu kata no oi bito to yamome pito ri pito midukara watarapu koto atapa nu mono to ni pa momi wo tamapu ")

comment.raw: IP-MAT,0@又八十以上老人及鰥寡孤独不能自存者,*

block.header: =N(" mata arapasi tama p yeru sirusi no manima ni mi yo no na pa aratame tama pu ")
=N(" koko wo motite tenpyau zingo no mi tose wo aratamete zingo keiun no pazime no tosi to su to noritama pu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu ")
